vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Find cap near selector base. Pry off.
neutral: Connect jump pack (12V only for PHEV). Shift normally or use slot.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground. AWD/PHEV: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.
FWD: Lift from REAR. Front (drive) wheels stay on the ground and roll freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard terminals. PHEV: 12V only.

shift: Find cap near selector base. Pry off.
neutral: Connect jump pack. Shift normally or use slot.
vehicles.notes: Evo X SST DCT: restore power first. Manual: clutch to N. AWD standard on Evo.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground. AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: Lift from REAR. Front (drive) wheels stay on the ground and roll freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION OPTION: If equipped with manual trans, no shift lock — depress clutch and select Neutral. No override slot needed.
CVT EQUIPPED: Do NOT exceed 35 mph or 50 miles with drive wheels on ground. Flatbed strongly preferred for CVTs.

battery.warnings: Evo SST DCT: restore power before shift.

shift: Find cap near selector base. Pry off.
neutral: Connect jump pack. Shift normally or use slot.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground. AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: Lift from REAR. Front (drive) wheels stay on the ground and roll freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.
CVT EQUIPPED: Do NOT exceed 35 mph or 50 miles with drive wheels on ground. Flatbed strongly preferred for CVTs.

shift: Find cap near selector base. Pry off.
neutral: Connect jump pack. Shift normally or use slot.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from rear (front/drive wheels roll on ground) or flatbed. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: Lift from REAR. Front (drive) wheels stay on the ground and roll freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.
